loading.hardwareAccelerationDesc: WebGL initialization failed. To provide a professional broadcast experience, AntStudio requires GPU acceleration enabled in your browser.

chrome.name: Chrome
chrome.title: Enable Hardware Acceleration in Chrome
chrome.steps[1]: Toggle on "Use hardware acceleration when available"
chrome.steps[4]: Enable "WebGL Draft Extensions" and "WebGL Developer Extensions"
chrome.steps[5]: Relaunch the browser to apply changes
chrome.troubleshoot: Visit get.webgl.org to verify. Check chrome://gpu for "Hardware accelerated" status.

firefox.name: Firefox
firefox.title: Enable Hardware Acceleration in Firefox
firefox.steps[0]: Type about:config in the address bar
firefox.steps[2]: Search for webgl.disabled and set to false
firefox.steps[3]: Search for webgl.force-enabled and set to true
firefox.steps[4]: Restart Firefox for settings to apply
firefox.troubleshoot: Visit get.webgl.org to verify. Check about:support for "WebRender" status.

safari.name: Safari
safari.title: Enable Hardware Acceleration in Safari
safari.steps[0]: Open Safari and go to Safari > Settings
safari.steps[2]: Check "Show Develop menu in menu bar"
safari.steps[3]: Close Settings and click Develop in the menu bar
safari.steps[4]: Hover over "Experimental Features" and enable "WebGL 2.0" and "WebGL 1.0" if available
safari.troubleshoot: Visit get.webgl.org to verify. Check about:support for "WebRender" status.
